Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia with low total CO₂, which may indicate metabolic acidosis. Lipid profile reveals elevated triglycerides and LDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including glucose, liver enzymes, and proteins, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and metabolic status.
